v3.1.2 is a standalone Python package — no agent framework required. This page walks through every step from prerequisites to verification."}],"\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22","\n","$L23","\n","$L24","\n","$L25","\n","$L26","\n","$L27","\n","$L28","\n","$L29","\n","$L2a","\n","$L2b","\n","$L2c","\n","$L2d"],["$L2e"],"$L2f"]}],{},null,false,null]},null,false,"$@30"]},null,false,"$@30"]},null,false,null]},null,false,null],"$L31",false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$32",["$L33"]],"S":true,"h":null,"s":"$undefined","l":"$undefined","p":"$undefined","d":"$undefined","b":"Sb8Pv6LF3kvebTSlufmqO"}
34:I[97367,["/_next/static/chunks/146uonv6bn6sr.js","/_next/static/chunks/0n4z.7yu76je-.js"],"OutletBoundary"]
35:"$Sreact.suspense"
38:I[97367,["/_next/static/chunks/146uonv6bn6sr.js","/_next/static/chunks/0n4z.7yu76je-.js"],"ViewportBoundary"]
3a:I[97367,["/_next/static/chunks/146uonv6bn6sr.js","/_next/static/chunks/0n4z.7yu76je-.js"],"MetadataBoundary"]
7:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Prerequisites"}]
8:["$","p",null,{"children":"Before installing Mnemosyne, make sure you have:"}]
9:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Python 3.9 or higher"}]," — check with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"python --version"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"pip"}]," or ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"uv"}]," package manager available in your shell"]}],"\n"]}]
a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Quick Install"}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":"Two commands. That's all it takes."}]
c:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Step 1 — Install the package:"}]}]
d:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Using pip\npip install mnemosyne-memory[all]\n\n# Using uv (faster)\nuv pip install mnemosyne-memory[all]\n"}]}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Step 2 — Verify:"}]}]
f:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"python -c \"import mnemosyne; print(mnemosyne.__version__)\"\n# Should print: 2.8.0\n"}]}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":"That's it. No database setup, no container orchestration, no config files. Mnemosyne creates its SQLite database automatically on first use."}]
11:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Install Options"}]
12:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"pip vs uv"}]
13:["$","p",null,{"children":["Both work. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"uv"}]," is faster, but use the matching command:"]}]
14:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Tool"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Install command"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[all]"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"uv"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"uv pip install mnemosyne-memory[all]"}]}]]}]]}]]}]
15:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Extras"}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne ships optional dependency groups you can install as needed:"}]
17:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Extra"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Command"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"What it adds"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Core (not recommended)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Base package with FTS5 keyword search only"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Embeddings"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"+ fastembed for semantic vector search"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"LLM consolidation"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[llm]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"+ ctransformers for local LLM sleep consolidation"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Everything"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[all]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"All optional dependencies"}]]}]]}]]}]
18:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Optional: sqlite-vec for Performance"}]
19:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}]," is an ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"optional performance boost"}]," for large datasets (100K+ memories). It moves vector similarity search into native C code inside SQLite. Without it, Mnemosyne uses an in-memory numpy fallback that works fine for most use cases."]}]
1a:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pip install sqlite-vec\n"}]}]
1b:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["With ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[all]"}]," only:"]}]," Full semantic search + hybrid retrieval via in-memory numpy cosine similarity. Works great for most deployments."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["With ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[all]"}]," + ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}],":"]}]," Same semantic search, but vector queries run in native C inside SQLite. Faster on very large datasets."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["Without ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[all]"}],":"]}]," FTS5 keyword search only, regardless of sqlite-vec."]}],"\n"]}]
1c:["$","p",null,{"children":"Install sqlite-vec only if you need maximum performance on huge datasets."}]
1d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Verify Installation"}]
1e:["$","p",null,{"children":"Check the installed version directly:"}]
1f:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"python -c \"import mnemosyne; print(mnemosyne.__version__)\"\n"}]}]
20:["$","p",null,{"children":"You can also run a quick smoke test:"}]
21:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\nmem.remember(\"Installation test\", importance=0.1)\nresults = mem.recall(\"test\")\nprint(f\"Stored and retrieved {len(results)} memory\")\n"}]}]
22:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"MCP Server Setup"}]
23:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne v2 includes a built-in MCP server for Claude Desktop and other MCP clients:"}]
24:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Add to your Claude Desktop config (claude_desktop_config.json):\n{\n  \"mcpServers\": {\n    \"mnemosyne\": {\n      \"command\": \"mnemosyne\",\n      \"args\": [\"mcp\"]\n    }\n  }\n}\n"}]}]
25:["$","p",null,{"children":"For SSE transport (web clients):"}]
26:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"mnemosyne mcp --transport sse --port 8080\n"}]}]
27:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Hermes Agent Integration"}]
28:["$","p",null,{"children":"If you're using Mnemosyne as a Hermes plugin:"}]
29:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-yaml","children":"# hermes.yaml\nplugins:\n  - name: mnemosyne-memory\n    source: pip\n    config:\n      auto_sleep: true\n      sleep_threshold: 50\n      vector_type: int8\n      ignore_patterns: []\n      profile_isolation: false\n"}]}]
2a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Development Install (from Source)"}]
2b:["$","p",null,{"children":"If you're contributing or want to run the latest unreleased changes:"}]
2c:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Clone the repo\ngit clone https://github.com/axdsan/mnemosyne.git\ncd mnemosyne\n\n# Create a virtual environment\npython -m venv .venv\nsource .venv/bin/activate\n\n# Install in editable mode with dev dependencies\npip install -e \".[dev]\"\n"}]}]
2d:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"-e"}]," flag installs in \"editable\" mode — changes to the source code take effect immediately without re-installing. Perfect for development and debugging."]}]
2e:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/09vsub61~3cmu.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}]
2f:["$","$L34",null,{"children":["$","$35",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@36"}]}]
37:[]
30:"$W37"
